---
title: "*Steam: Get the Quality Right AFTER You Table It!* (Steam Tables) Reference Page"
author: "DOFPro group"
format: html
html-math-method: mathjax
---
::: {.callout-important title="Still Under Construction!"}
This web page is just a bare outline. The complete details have not been filled in yet.
:::
# Intro to *Steam: Get the Quality Right AFTER You Table It!*

Main title explanation

## Steam: Get the Quality Right AFTER You Table It! Part 1 

Video 1 explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/8tH3gXz_M8A?si=ZSnLBeA9c4uXRMsC" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[Visuals](../../NotYetHere.qmd)

## Steam: Get the Quality Right AFTER You Table It! Part 2 

Video  explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/yRf09eSRM1A?si=Ti4C8E1i9Rd9oXS0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[Visuals](../../NotYetHere.qmd)

# Examples and Definitions

## Examples Links

- [Steam Tables](https://dofprobucket1.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/energy/SteamTables.ods)

## Definitions

Steam Table
: A tabulation of the thermodynamic properties of saturated liquid water, saturated steam, and superheated steam. The saturated values are tabulated as a function of temperature or pressure, and the superheated values require both a temperature and pressure. The tabulated properties are usually the specific volume, $\hat{V}$, the specific internal energy, $\hat{U}$, the specific enthalpy, $\hat{H}$, and the specific entropy, $\hat{S}$.

# Other Links and Videos

## Other Links

## Previous and Following Videos

### The video previous to the previous video (i.e., two videos back)

**Just Try to Break This Law! I Dare You!**<br/>*Intro to 1st Law*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/ZHWT9Jw7fzY), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/Intro1stLawVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/89-Intro1stLawVisuals.qmd)

### The previous video (i.e., one video back)

**Add Friction and Work to Bernoulli? Here’s What Really Happens!**<br/>*The Mechanical Energy Balance and the Moody Chart*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/Da48oZb9oNw), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/MechanicalEnergyBalanceVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/90-MechEngBalVisuals.qmd)

### The next video (i.e., one video forward)

**The Enthalpy Games: The Ballad of Integrals and Means**<br/>*$\Delta H$ from $C_p$, $\Delta U$ from $C_v$*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/YGMHMAXnFY8), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/HeatCapacityVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/93-EnthalpyVsTandPPart1.qmd)

### The next after next video (i.e. two videos forward)

**The Enthalpy Games: Sunrise on the Calculations**<br/>*Example for $\mathrm{N_2}$, $\Delta H$ from $C_p$, $\Delta U$ from $C_v$*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/yLJp3YQaVvo), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/HeatCapacityVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/94-EnthalpyVsTandPPart2.qmd)
